name: Hazelnut Bread and Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons nonfat dry milk powder (2 T)
1 tablespoon anise seed or fennel seed (2 T)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the bread flour, whole-wheat flour, wheat germ, nonfat dry milk powder, sugar, anise seed or fennel seed, and salt.
2. Add water and yeast to the dry ingredients. Stir until combined.
3. Form the dough into a loaf shape (1 1/2 lb) and place it in a greased bread pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 190°F.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
6. To make biscotti, slice the cooled bread into 1-inch thick slices.
7. Place the slices on a baking sheet and toast in a preheated oven at 350°F for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Let the toasted slices cool completely before storing them in an airtight container or freezing for later use.
